sentences.arabic: اجْتَمَعَ وَزِيرُ الْخَارِجِيَّةِ مَعَ سُفَرَاءِ الدُّوَلِ الْمُجَاوِرَةِ فِي الْعَاصِمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ministar vanjskih poslova sastao se s ambasadorima susjednih zemalja u glavnom gradu.
sentences.translationEn: The Foreign Minister met with ambassadors of neighboring countries in the capital.

sentences.arabic: نَاقَشَ الْمَسْؤُولُونَ سُبُلَ تَعْزِيزِ التَّعَاوُنِ التِّجَارِيِّ وَالْأَمْنِيِّ بَيْنَ الْبُلْدَانِ.
sentences.translation: Zvaničnici su razgovarali o načinima jačanja trgovinske i sigurnosne saradnje između država.
sentences.translationEn: Officials discussed ways to strengthen trade and security cooperation between the countries.

sentences.arabic: أَكَّدَ الْجَمِيعُ عَلَى أَهَمِّيَّةِ السَّلَامِ وَالِاسْتِقْرَارِ فِي الْمِنْطَقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Svi su naglasili važnost mira i stabilnosti u regiji.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone emphasized the importance of peace and stability in the region.

sentences.arabic: اسْتَمَرَّ الِاجْتِمَاعُ لِمُدَّةِ ثَلَاثِ سَاعَاتِ وَكَانَ النَّقَاشُ إِيجَابِيًّا جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Sastanak je trajao tri sata i diskusija je bila veoma pozitivna.
sentences.translationEn: The meeting lasted for three hours and the discussion was very positive.

sentences.arabic: سَيَتِمُّ تَوْقِيعُ اتِّفَاقِيَّةٍ جَدِيدَةٍ فِي نِهَايَةِ الْعَامِ الْحَالِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Novi sporazum će biti potpisan krajem tekuće godine.
sentences.translationEn: A new agreement will be signed at the end of the current year.
